hero.title: The pleasure of the table, the French way.
hero.subtitle: French heritage, honest cooking and home tradition. An elegant and welcoming space in the heart of Las Palmas de Gran Canaria.

philosophy.label: Our philosophy
philosophy.title: Happiness is hidden in the small details.
philosophy.text: Amelie was born from the desire to share what we love most about France. Not the clichés, not the apparent luxury. Real France. The France of families, markets, long lunches and flavours that awaken memories.

experience.label: The experience
experience.title:
We don't serve France.
We share it.
experience.text: Every dish, every detail and every story you will find at Amelie comes from a real experience. That of a French woman who, far from her country, decided to open a place to share everything she loves about her gastronomic culture.

pan.title: Our bread
pan.text: Made entirely in our kitchen. Our own recipe, a special blend of flours. A ritual that begins before the first course.

galette.title: La galette bretonne
galette.text: Organic flour from Brittany, milled at a historic mill active since 1870. The only authentic galette in Gran Canaria.

historia.title: Our story
historia.text: A French woman far from home shares with Las Palmas what she loves most about France. A real story, an authentic experience.

galette.label: Brittany · Since 1870
galette.title: The galette that crossed the ocean.
galette.text1: In Brittany, there is a mill that has been active since 1870. There, the organic buckwheat flour is milled that travels to Las Palmas de Gran Canaria exclusively for Amelie.
galette.text2: It's not a crepe. It's a gastronomic tradition with centuries of history. An honest recipe, with real ingredients, made as it has always been done in Breton homes.

kilometro.label: Km.0 · Seasonal
kilometro.title:
From the Canary Islands fields,
through French hands.
kilometro.text: There is no fixed menu. There is what the local market gives us today. Local produce from Gran Canaria crafted with French technique and recipes. The Canary Islands provide the land. France provides the soul.
kilometro.caption: Seasonal ingredients · Gran Canaria

instagram.label: Follow us
instagram.title:
Life at Amelie,
one detail at a time.

footer.tagline: A French experience in the heart of Las Palmas.
